rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §8.061, which mandates dyslexia specialist employment at regional education service centers. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Each regional education service center shall employ as a dyslexia specialist a person licensed as a dyslexia therapist under Chapter 403, Occupations Code
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns dyslexia specialist staffing, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
